'''Vermilion''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]]. In order to avoid [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attention Vermilion took on several codenames, including Scarlett and Carmile. In order to allow Rebel sympathizers to recognize him however, Vermilion always wore a red article of clothing. He was also responsible for recruiting [[Havet Storm]] and was the architect of the Rebel attack on the Imperial Research Station on Toprawa. He was killed by [[Facet Anamor]] during the raid, while attempting to broadcast the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Superlaser/Legends|Superlaser]] plans to the Rebel Alliance ship in orbit.
